robots_txt.description: robots.txt should be accessible and properly configured.
robots_txt.remediation: Ensure robots.txt is accessible and allows important pages.

xml_sitemap.description: XML sitemap should be accessible and list indexable URLs.
xml_sitemap.remediation: Provide a valid XML sitemap and submit it to search engines.

canonical_tag.description: Canonical tag should be present and correct.

og_tags.description: Open Graph tags should be present.
og_tags.remediation: Add Open Graph tags for rich previews.

hreflang_tags.description: Hreflang tags should be present for multi-language sites.
hreflang_tags.remediation: Add hreflang tags for language targeting.

site_hierarchy.description: Logical site hierarchy with shallow URL depth.
site_hierarchy.remediation: Keep important pages within 3 clicks / shallow paths.

internal_linking.remediation: Add internal links to key pages.

breadcrumbs.description: Breadcrumb navigation improves UX and SEO.
breadcrumbs.remediation: Add breadcrumb navigation and Schema.org markup.

responsive_design.remediation: Ensure mobile responsive layout and viewport meta.

ssl_certificate.description: Site should be served over HTTPS.
ssl_certificate.remediation: Enable SSL and redirect HTTP to HTTPS.

mixed_content.description: No mixed content warnings on HTTPS pages.
mixed_content.remediation: Ensure all resources load over HTTPS.

heading_tags.description: Heading tags should follow a logical structure.
heading_tags.remediation: Ensure a single H1 and logical H2/H3 usage.

heading_text_analysis.description: Heading text should align with intent and keywords.

meta_title.description: Meta title should be under 60 characters.
meta_title.remediation: Adjust the meta title to be within recommended length.

meta_description.description: Meta description should be under 160 characters.
meta_description.remediation: Adjust the meta description to be within recommended length.

image_alt_text.remediation: Add descriptive alt text to images.

hidden_content.description: Avoid hidden content for users or crawlers.
hidden_content.remediation: Remove hidden content or ensure visibility.

keyword_density.description: Keyword density should be within recommended range.
keyword_density.remediation: Adjust keyword usage to a natural 3–5% range.

duplicate_content.description: Avoid duplicate or highly similar content.
duplicate_content.remediation: Use canonicalization or rewrite duplicate content.

similar_urls.description: Detect similar URLs based on content similarity.

thin_content.remediation: Expand content to be meaningful and substantial.

server_logs.description: Server log analysis for crawl optimization.
server_logs.remediation: Analyze server logs to improve crawl efficiency.

crawl_traps.remediation: Avoid infinite URL patterns and parameter traps.

errors_404.remediation: Fix broken pages or redirect appropriately.

broken_links.description: No broken links should be present.
broken_links.remediation: Fix internal and external broken links.

redirect_chains.remediation: Reduce redirect chains and fix loops.

schema_markup.description: Schema markup should be present and valid.
schema_markup.remediation: Add JSON-LD schema markup matching visible content.

ga_setup.description: Google Analytics setup should be present.

gsc_setup.description: Google Search Console verification should be present.
gsc_setup.remediation: Verify site ownership in Google Search Console.

eeat.remediation: Add author info, credentials, and trust signals.

geo_friendly.remediation: Use short paragraphs and clear headings.

faq_in_blog.remediation: Add FAQ section with schema markup.

llms_txt.remediation: Add /llms.txt file for AI access rules.

ai_visibility.remediation: Add conversational tone, citations, and first-hand experience.

page_speed.description: Core Web Vitals and performance metrics.
page_speed.remediation: Improve LCP, INP, CLS and mobile performance.
